lesson: Design system tokens had changed from luxury palette to workspace.ae B2B palette. Round-table findings referenced old tokens (gold, sage). Always reconcile findings against current MASTER.md before applying corrections.

Aziz rejected 50/50 split hero. Full-bleed overlay pattern spec written. Gold used only on collection label (Aziz-authorized override of MASTER no-gold rule). Blueprint watermark at 4% opacity corner only — MASTER anti-pattern exemption documented in spec. Always check if prior spec was rejected before building on it.

Homepage spec covers 6 sections: Header, Hero (delta from hero-banner v1.0), Category Navigator, New Arrivals, Trust Signals, Footer. Hero indicators (horizontal lines) and mega menu were not in hero-banner.md v1.0 — addressed in homepage.md as hero delta. Product cards reference MASTER spec directly. E-commerce data is mock per project_ecom_delay.

bg-white] and gray-900] Tailwind typos are pervasive across 8+ files — broken button backgrounds and text colors. Labels not linked to inputs via htmlFor/id in contact-form.tsx. Duplicate skip link rendered in both layout.tsx and header.tsx.
